kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: 7 coins goes with exactly one of Edmund, Carpenter, or Weaver.
The Fletcher's levy is higher than both Rowan and the artisan in Riverside.
Either Mason goes with Riverside or someone in the South Side goes with Cooper.
Godfrey, Carpenter, and 12 coins go with Bridgegate, Riverside, and Southgate, in some order.
If Kingsford goes with Aldric, then 8 coins does not go with Rowan.
Blacksmith goes with either Eastcheap or 10 coins (but not both).
Aldric, Edmund, and Wulfric go with Blacksmith, Cooper, and Bridgegate, in some order.
Exactly one of these is true: Matilda goes with Eastcheap; Rowan goes with 11 coins; Wulfric goes with 12 coins.
Either 9 coins goes with Riverside or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with 12 coins (but not both).
9 coins goes with exactly two of Wulfric, Cooper, and Kingsford.
Rowan goes with exactly two of Mason, Highrow, and 10 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: 4 lb goes with exactly one of Cody, Bluegill, or Trout.
The angler who landed the Catfish's weight is higher than both Royce and the angler at Stillwater.
Either Perch goes with Stillwater or someone in the Highland Basin goes with Carp.
Dale, Bluegill, and 9 lb go with Birchpool, Stillwater, and Willowmere, in some order.
If Pinehollow goes with Boone, then 5 lb does not go with Royce.
Bass goes with either Cedarmere or 7 lb (but not both).
Boone, Cody, and Wade go with Bass, Carp, and Birchpool, in some order.
Exactly one of these is true: Esther goes with Cedarmere; Royce goes with 8 lb; Wade goes with 9 lb.
Either 6 lb goes with Stillwater or someone in the Sunfish Family goes with 9 lb (but not both).
6 lb goes with exactly two of Wade, Carp, and Pinehollow.
Royce goes with exactly two of Perch, Grayreach, and 7 lb.
